positiveText: A pristine, high-fidelity 2D Japanese cel-shaded anime illustration. This is a professional high-definition remaster of the reference image. Strictly maintain the flat shading, bold outlines, and vibrant aesthetic; absolutely no 3D rendering or photorealistic textures. Dramatically enhance the precision of the line art, making every stroke razor-sharp, elegant, and clean. Increase visual complexity by adding intricate clothing folds and more refined, multi-layered hair strands while keeping the shading blocks distinct and non-gradient. The eyes should be rendered with mesmerizing, crisp detail within the stylized anime framework. The output must look like a high-budget modern anime movie frame, defined by its crystal-clear 2D clarity, perfect color fidelity, and sophisticated simplicity.
